item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
At first, I was reading Mr. Bonypart's dialog in Yakko Warner's voice.

Then I realized that it wasn't Yakko's voice. It was Morte's. Same voice actor (Rob Paulsen).

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
skele-boye just trying to make a life for himself among the living.
+1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: upvoted as soon as i read "napoleon bonyparts" anyways 10/10 would provide amenities for

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Claptrap plus cartoon gangster plus a dash of Papyrus. I love this. Poor boneboi

+1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Napoleon is such an endearing skeleton, this was a lot of fun to read for his personality alone. Definitely an interesting character especially since his true thoughts seeped through despite the programming. This gets a +1 from me.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
I stumbled across this on accident while trying to read about Wilhelm. I'll be honest, I miss Wilhelm the Knight(probably because I'm just a sucker for sad humanoid skips), but this is a damn good skip to have replaced him! This article was great - funny and sad at the same time, somehow, and really well written. I love Napoleon Bonyparts.

I only found you recently, CadaverCommander, but you are quickly becoming my favorite author!

Definite +1 from me.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
"Nyeah!"
+1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: That's usually the go-to, but some sapient SCPs that are too weak to break containment or are compliant (like 507) are considered safe, since they don't really want to leave in the first place

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Really enjoy the storytelling and characterization. I like the use of his conflicting programming and the fact that his humor can be seen as genuine and sarcastic simultaneously.

+1 from me

Say "hi" to Mr. Bonyparts for me.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Foundation necromancers

Man, you just keep doing it. I swear I could smell you in this article from the first paragraph. And yeah, upvoting the hell out of this probably.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
I'm not even allowed to change my tone of voice to accurately reflect how miserable I feel basically all the time!

Oh no.

(SCP-3988 vibrates briefly, clacks its jaw shut, and freezes for a short moment.)

SCP-3988: … Huh! Well I… guess he lied to me! Haha! Funny stuff!

Oh no.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Shouldn't this bony boi be euclid since he's got some free-will?

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Skeletons are the best.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
"Also, he thought it was hilarious! It's not!"

I was set on an upvote at that point.

Never heard of Undertale, by the way.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
The moment I saw this was about a slick, wise-cracking skeleton, I knew who wrote this

Good stuff as usual, Cad

+1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
It's almost as if talking skeletons weren't only invented in 2015 >_>

In any case, this is yet another wonderful example of CC's proven characterization and behind-the-scenes worldbuilding skills. Napoleon here is a nuanced character, and the juxtaposition between his cheerful, snarky tone and the messed-up-ness of his programmed nature is 👌 and leaves plenty of room to speculate on what kind of a person the Baron really is.

Easy +1.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
It's not just that, and I don't mean to sound rude about your work1, there's elements of this article that just don't really strike me fancy. I've seen characters like this before in the form of both Skeletor and Papyrus and it feels too much like both of the characters.

Of course, that isn't to say that I dislike the comedy those two characters can bring, but this article doesn't have much else that grabs me.

Judging by your comment I'm worried that I insulted you, and I'm sorry.

Footnotes
1. I've read your other stuff and you're a very talented writer.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: yeah i've never played that game. sorry that's enough to buck you out, though

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Ehhhh….I hate to be the Debbie downer of the comments but I really can't get into this. It's well written and I'm not going to downvote, I don't really like the undertale vibes this is giving me.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Zoinks, this is quite the skele-man! Great comedy and character building as always, Commander. +1 from me.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Take my +1 and use it to buy some ice cream for the bonny bony boi pls

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
SCP-3988: Nyeah!

mfw

+1 for this boni boi

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: This guy reminds me of Papyrus from Undertail.

item.title: eat a sandwich, skinny
item.content:encoded:
dis bony boi got the razzle-dazzle for sure.

thanks to the folks in chat that helped me go over this. you know who you is.

and thank you, reader, for being so classy ♥
